category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a fuzzy finder with preview window for command runners; official README describes executing make/npm/pnpm/yarn/just/task commands using fuzzy finder.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is fzf-make; official GitHub repository heading is kyu08/fzf-make.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, supported commands, and development sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README topics include rust, cli, task, terminal, fzf, makefile, tui, make, just, pnpm, fuzzy-finder, and ratatui.
